news.title: Thailand Plans 20% Electricity Price Cut for Low-Use Households
news.description: Thailand plans to cut electricity tariffs by about 20% for households that use relatively little power, in a bid to ease living costs amid surging global energy costs, according to Energy Minister Akanat Promphan.
